phoneticUs: 藢e瑟t蕛 ju藧 藞di藧
meaning: (Department of) Housing and Urban Development (缇庡浗)浣忔埧鍜屽煄甯傚彂灞曢儴
examples: And HUD is trying to seize it.
Often the only roadblock to innovation in New York, he found, was HUD.
But "in crisis, there is opportunity", says Mr Donovan. And HUD is trying to seize it.
The FHA-insured loans are made by private mortgage companies, which are in turn monitored by HUD.
Six of the 10 lenders on our list have been investigated by HUD recently.
